column3:
SELECT
  product_name,
  unit_price
FROM products
ORDER BY
  unit_price DESC
LIMIT 5;

SELECT
  c.company_name,
  COUNT(o.order_id) AS total_orders
FROM customers AS c
JOIN orders AS o
  ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
GROUP BY
  c.customer_id,
  c.company_name
ORDER BY
  c.company_name;
